docs.title: MIAPPE LinkML
docs.text:
A LinkML representation of the MIAPPE (Minimum Information About a Plant Phenotyping Experiment) v1.1 checklist and data model. The structure follows the MIAPPE entity relationship diagram (Investigation > Study > Observation Unit > Sample) together with the supporting entities (Person, Publication, Biological Material, Environment Parameter, Experimental Factor, Event, Data File and Observed Variable). Each slot records its MIAPPE "codename" in a comment, and enumerations are derived from the MIAPPE checklist and its appendices.

URI: https://w3id.org/sierra-moxon/miappe-linkml

Name: miappe-linkml

docs.title: Class: BiologicalMaterial
docs.text: The biological material being studied (e.g. plants grown from a certain bag or seed, or plants grown in a particular field). The original source of that material is called the material source.

docs.text: A condition that varies between observation units, which may be biotic (pest, disease interaction) or abiotic (treatment and cultural practice) in nature. The object of a study is to ascertain the impact of one or more factors on the biological material.

docs.title: Class: Investigation
docs.text: Investigations are research programmes with defined aims. They can exist at various scales (for example, they could encompass a grant-funded programme of work, the various components comprising a peer-reviewed publication, or a single experiment). One investigation is expected per MIAPPE submission.

docs.title: Slot: altitude
docs.text: Altitude provided in metres (m).

docs.title: Slot: anatomical_entity
docs.text: A description of the plant part or plant product from which the sample was taken (Plant Ontology, subclass of PO:0025131).

docs.title: Slot: associated_publication
docs.text: An identifier for a literature publication where the investigation is described. Use of DOIs is recommended.

docs.title: Slot: associated_publications
docs.text: Publications where the investigation is described. Use of DOIs is recommended.

docs.title: Slot: biological_material
docs.text: Reference(s) (by biological_material_id) to the biological material(s) comprising this observation unit. The referenced materials are defined at the study level. An observation unit may reference zero or more biological materials (e.g. intercropping or mixed plots).

docs.title: Slot: biological_material_external_ids
docs.text: One to many identifiers for the biological material. Can include EBI Biosamples ID. URIs are recommended when possible.

docs.title: Slot: biological_material_id
docs.text: Code used to identify the biological material in the data file. Should be unique within the Investigation.

docs.title: Slot: biological_material_preprocessing
docs.text: Description of any process or treatment applied uniformly to the biological material, prior to the study itself.

docs.title: Slot: biological_materials
docs.text: The biological materials studied in this study.

docs.title: Slot: collection_date
docs.text: The date and time when the sample was collected / harvested.

docs.title: Slot: contact_institution
docs.text: Name and address of the institution responsible for the study.

docs.title: Slot: coordinates_uncertainty
docs.text: Circular uncertainty of the coordinates, preferably in metres (m).

docs.title: Slot: cultural_practices
docs.text: General description of the cultural practices of the study.

docs.title: Slot: data_file_description
docs.text: Description of the format of the data file. May be a standard file format name, or a description of the organization of the data in a tabular file.

docs.title: Slot: data_file_link
docs.text: Link to the data file (or digital object) in a public database or in a persistent institutional repository; or identifier of the data file when submitted together with the MIAPPE submission.

docs.title: Slot: data_file_version
docs.text: The version of the dataset (the actual data).

docs.title: Slot: data_files
docs.text: The data files associated with this study.

docs.title: Slot: development_stage
docs.text: The stage in the life of a plant structure during which the sample was taken (Plant Ontology, subclass of PO:0009012, or BBCH scale).

docs.title: Slot: environment_parameter_name
docs.text: Name of the environment parameter constant within the experiment (see MIAPPE Appendix I).

docs.title: Slot: environment_parameter_value
docs.text: Value of the environment parameter constant within the experiment.

docs.title: Slot: environment_parameters
docs.text: The constant environment parameters of this study.

docs.title: Entity-Relationship Diagram
docs.text:
A Mermaid entity-relationship diagram of the full miappe_linkml schema, generated from the source with gen-erdiagram.

erDiagram
BiologicalMaterial {

Investigation {

}
MaterialSource {

Method {

ObservationUnit {

    stringList spatial_distribution  
}
ObservedVariable {
    uriorcurie variable_accession_number

}
Person {
    stringList person_affiliations

}

}
Sample {

Scale {

}
Trait {
    uriorcurie trait_accession_number

}

docs.title: miappe-linkml
docs.text:
A LinkML representation of the MIAPPE (Minimum Information About a Plant Phenotyping Experiment) v1.1 checklist and data model. The structure follows the MIAPPE entity relationship diagram (Investigation > Study > Observation Unit > Sample) together with the supporting entities (Person, Publication, Biological Material, Environment Parameter, Experimental Factor, Event, Data File and Observed Variable). Each slot records its MIAPPE "codename" in a comment, and enumerations are derived from the MIAPPE checklist and its appendices.

URI: https://w3id.org/sierra-moxon/miappe-linkml

docs.title: Slot: miappe_version
docs.text: The version of MIAPPE used.

docs.title: Slot: observation_unit_description
docs.text: General description of the observation units in the study.

docs.title: Slot: observation_unit_external_ids
docs.text: Identifier for the observation unit in a persistent repository. URIs are recommended when possible.

docs.title: Slot: observation_unit_factor_values
docs.text: List of values for each factor applied to the observation unit.

docs.title: Slot: observation_unit_id
docs.text: Identifier used to identify the observation unit in data files containing the values observed or measured on that unit. Must be locally unique.

docs.title: Slot: observation_unit_level_hierarchy
docs.text: Hierarchy of the different levels of repetitions between each other.

docs.title: Slot: observation_unit_type
docs.text: Type of observation unit, usually one of: study, block, sub-block, plot, sub-plot, pot, plant.

docs.title: Slot: observation_units
docs.text: The observation units of this study.

docs.title: Slot: observed_variables
docs.text: The observed variables measured in this study.

docs.title: Slot: organism
docs.text: An identifier for the organism at the species level. Use of the NCBI taxon ID is recommended.

docs.title: Slot: person_affiliations
docs.text: The institution the person belongs to.

docs.title: Slot: person_email
docs.text: The electronic mail address of the person.

docs.title: Slot: person_id
docs.text: An identifier for the data submitter. If that submitter is an individual, ORCID identifiers are recommended.

docs.title: Slot: person_name
docs.text: The name of the person (either full name or as used in scientific publications).

docs.title: Slot: person_roles
docs.text: Type of contribution of the person to the investigation.

docs.title: Slot: persons
docs.text: The people involved in this investigation or study.

docs.title: Slot: public_release_date
docs.text: Date of first public release of the dataset presently being described (ISO 8601, optional time zone).

docs.title: Slot: sample_description
docs.text: Any information not captured by the other sample fields, including quantification, sample treatments and processing.

docs.title: Slot: sample_external_ids
docs.text: An identifier for the sample in a persistent repository. URIs are recommended when possible.

docs.title: Slot: sample_id
docs.text: Unique identifier for the sample.

docs.title: Slot: samples
docs.text: The samples taken from this observation unit.

docs.title: Slot: scale
docs.text: The scale component of the observed variable.

docs.title: Slot: scale_accession_number
docs.text: Accession number of the scale in a suitable controlled vocabulary.

docs.title: Slot: scale_name
docs.text: Name of the scale associated with the variable.

docs.title: Slot: site_name
docs.text: The name of the natural site, experimental field, greenhouse, phenotyping facility, etc. where the experiment took place.

docs.title: Slot: spatial_distribution
docs.text: Type and value of a spatial coordinate (georeference or relative) or level of observation, provided as a key-value pair of the form type:value.

docs.title: Slot: species
docs.text: Species name (formally: specific epithet) for the organism under study, according to standard scientific nomenclature.

docs.title: Slot: studies
docs.text: The studies belonging to this investigation.

docs.title: Slot: study_description
docs.text: Human-readable text describing the study.

docs.title: Slot: study_end_date
docs.text: Date and, if relevant, time when the experiment ended.

docs.title: Slot: study_id
docs.text: Unique identifier comprising the name or identifier for the institution/database hosting the submission of the study data, and the identifier of the study in that institution.

docs.title: Slot: study_start_date
docs.text: Date and, if relevant, time when the experiment started.

docs.title: Slot: study_title
docs.text: Name, human-readable text summarising the study.

docs.title: Slot: submission_date
docs.text: Date of submission of the dataset presently being described to a host repository (ISO 8601, optional time zone).

docs.title: Slot: time_scale
docs.text: Name of the scale or unit of time with which observations of this type were recorded in the data file (for time series studies).

docs.title: Slot: trait
docs.text: The trait component of the observed variable.

docs.title: Slot: trait_accession_number
docs.text: Accession number of the trait in a suitable controlled vocabulary (Crop Ontology, Trait Ontology).

docs.title: Slot: trait_characteristic
docs.text: Characteristic measured (e.g. size, volume, surface, concentration).

docs.title: Slot: trait_characteristic_accession_number
docs.text: Accession number of the trait characteristic in a suitable controlled vocabulary (PATO).

docs.title: Slot: trait_entity
docs.text: Entity (part of the plant, whole plant, group of plants e.g. canopy) on which the trait has been measured.

docs.title: Slot: trait_entity_accession_number
docs.text: Accession number of the trait entity in a suitable controlled vocabulary (Plant Ontology).

docs.title: Slot: trait_name
docs.text: Name of the (plant or environmental) trait under observation.

docs.title: Slot: variable_accession_number
docs.text: Accession number of the variable in the Crop Ontology.

docs.title: Slot: variable_id
docs.text: Code used to identify the variable in the data file. A variable ID must be unique within a given investigation.

docs.title: Slot: variable_name
docs.text: Name of the variable.
